_comment: Jacquard cosim testbench config for jtag_minimal. Drives the post-PnR netlist (data/top.pnl.v) from the captured remote_bitbang stream (data/bitbang.rec) via JtagReplayModel. Observable design outputs (data0_obs, dmactive_obs, haltreq_obs) are surfaced via --trace-signals into the timing VCD; pass criterion is checked by the CI step grepping data0_obs[*] bit transitions.
_clocks_comment: AIG detects two clock domains: the chip's `clk` (continuous) and `tck` (driven by JtagReplayModel on the bytes' schedule). Both must be declared in `clocks` so MultiClockScheduler allocates a tick slot for each — the model overrides `tck` at each byte transition.
